name: French Fried Sweet Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Parboil sweet potatoes for about 10 minutes, then drain and peel them. Cut into strips.
2. In a bowl, mix the egg with water and beat thoroughly.
3. Divide the crushed corn flakes into two separate bowls (each containing approximately 1/2 cup).
4. Dip the cut potatoes first in flour or one of the bowls of crushed flakes, then in the egg mixture, and finally in the other bowl of crushed flakes.
5. Deep fry the potatoes in oil heated to 375-385°F (190-205°C) until they are browned.
6. Drain on absorbent paper and sprinkle with salt. Alternatively, you can season with a mixture of cinnamon and sugar for a sweet taste.
